title: Smoke and Bitterness
description: The mod adds cigarettes and cigars. Suitable for realistic and noir builds.
body: This mod adds an adult lifestyle and street life atmosphere to the game: cigarettes, tobacco. It is suitable for realistic, post-Soviet or noir builds, enhancing the feeling of time, fatigue and conversations “in the kitchen” or “at the entrance”. All items have visual models, effects and can be used for role-playing or creating scenes.
